Full-Stack Developer · Philippines

Robert James
Cabansay

RJ  ·  Full-Stack Developer  ·  Next.js  ·  React  ·  Supabase

I'm a self-taught full-stack developer building production web apps with Next.js, React, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS. I specialize in SaaS dashboards, POS systems, booking apps, and custom business tools — shipped as polished PWAs or full Next.js + Supabase products deployed on Vercel.

I started with Checkout Hub — a tool I built for my own business — and have since shipped 14+ production apps across restaurants, sports courts, retail, and hospitality. Every project is end-to-end: design, frontend, backend, auth, database, deploy. I help clients and employers get reliable, scalable software that actually ships.

🚀
Available for full-time, contract, or freelance.

I build full-stack web applications end-to-end — from UI design to database and deploy. Whether you're a startup needing a SaaS product, an SMB owner replacing spreadsheets, or a team looking for a reliable developer, I'm open to building with you.

What I Bring
🧩
Resourceful
Built 14+ production apps across restaurants, sports, retail, and hospitality — Next.js to single-file HTML. When there's no path, I find one.
🎙
Communicator
HR, real estate, finance — I've always led with clear, honest communication that builds trust fast.
👂
Good Listener
I ask the right questions and truly hear the answers. The best apps start with deeply understanding the problem.
🎯
Purpose-Driven
I don't just build apps — I build tools that make a real daily difference in how businesses operate.
🤝
Client-First
Every role I've had was about serving people well. That mentality carries into every single project.
🔄
Adaptable
Thrived in customer service, HR, finance, and sales. I adapt fast and deliver regardless of the challenge.
Tech Stack
⚡
Frontend
React, Next.js 14+, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML/CSS/JS — responsive, mobile-first design and component-driven UI.
🔌
Backend
Next.js API Routes, Supabase (Auth + PostgreSQL + Realtime), Prisma ORM, SQLite — full server-side logic and REST APIs.
📄
Data & Storage
Supabase Postgres, SQLite, Prisma schema migrations, localStorage, CSV import/export, real-time sync.
🛠
Tools & DevOps
Git, GitHub, Vercel (CI/CD + preview deploys), GitHub Pages, Node.js, Playwright (E2E), pnpm, VS Code.
🌎
Specialties
SaaS dashboards, POS & inventory systems, booking & scheduling platforms, multi-role auth, QR-based workflows.
👨‍💻
Work Style
Solo end-to-end builder. I own projects from concept to deploy — fast iteration, clean code, real deliverables.
My Journey
☕ Barista
8 months
Learned patience, customer service, and the art of listening. Every shift was a masterclass in reading people and responding with genuine care.
👥 HR Sourcing Specialist
4 months
Sharpened communication and people-matching skills. Learned to quickly understand what a business truly needs — applied to every client project.
📈 Financial Advisor
1 year
Helped clients plan finances and make smart decisions. Gave me deep appreciation for business tracking, P&L, and why the right tools matter enormously.
🏠 Real Estate Salesperson
Previous role
Mastered understanding what clients truly need, building trust quickly, and closing with honesty. Sharpened every people skill I have.
⚡ App Builder
Now — Freelancer
Everything clicked. Each job built a skill: listen (barista), match needs (HR), understand finances (advisor), earn trust (real estate). Now I build apps that genuinely help businesses grow.

How It Works
01
Tell me your problem
Walk me through what's slowing you down. I listen carefully and ask the right questions to understand the full picture.
02
I design the solution
I map out exactly the app you need. No bloat — just the cleanest answer to your actual problem.
03
You test a working demo
Within days, you get a live version to try. We refine it together until every detail fits.
04
You receive the full app
Delivered clean and ready to use. I walk you through every feature so your team hits the ground running.

Tenda Pro Live · tenda.ph
All-in-one restaurant & café OS — Next.js + Supabase
+

Full-stack restaurant operating system for Philippine SMBs. Real-time POS with 4 UI themes, QR menus auto-generated from product catalog, COGS tracking per ingredient, multi-period sales reports, payroll, expense logs, and an AI assistant for natural language queries. Smoke-tested on a Café Lina demo dataset with Playwright.

Premium multi-sport court booking platform. Basketball, tennis, badminton, volleyball, futsal, and pickleball — with QR check-in, team management, and Supabase cloud sync. Unified auth triggers trial + cloud sync automatically. v16.

Gold Palace Streetwear Live · Store
Manila streetwear brand — PWA storefront + Next.js owner dashboard
+

Two-layer system for a Manila streetwear brand. Public storefront PWA with cart and quick view. Owner-side Next.js dashboard with POS, orders, inventory, sales analytics, expenses, and reports — all backed by Supabase. Live at gold-palace-streetwear.vercel.app.

HTML PWANext.jsSupabasePOSInventoryStreetwearVercel
✄
Banot's Barbershop Latest Build
Solo-barber booking & client management SaaS
+

Full-stack booking app for a solo barber-owner. Clients pick a service and time slot, pay via GCash/Maya/BDO/BPI QR, and upload proof of payment. The barber reviews bookings in a calendar-style dashboard, confirms verified payments, and tracks each client's full visit history. Walk-in support and “due for a cut” rebooking reminders included.

Frequently Asked Questions
Do I need to know anything about technology?+
Not at all. Just tell me your problem in plain language. I handle all the technical side and walk you through the app until you're fully comfortable.
What if I need changes after delivery?+
Minor adjustments are included. Bigger additions are discussed as a small separate project at a fair price. I don't disappear after delivery.
How do we communicate during the project?+
However works best for you — Viber, WhatsApp, Messenger, or email. I give regular updates and share demos early so there are never any surprises.
Can I see a demo before paying in full?+
Yes. We start with a downpayment, and I share a working demo before you pay the balance. You only pay in full once you're happy with it.
Will it work on my phone?+
Yes. All apps work on phone, tablet, and desktop — no installation needed. Just open it in any browser.
Is my business data safe?+
Your data stays on your own device. I don't store or access your business information. Apps include backup and restore features so you're always in control.
